On July 29, 2025, while pulling into the driveway, my 2023 Nissan Armada experienced a complete electrical and brake failure. I put the vehicle in Park, and the entire dash and infotainment screen went black while the engine was still running. The vehicle began rolling forward ev

Bought vehicle used from dealer so it must have been damaged by previous owner. In less than 1 hour driving in freeway over 60mph in extreme outside heat of 107F, the transmission went out. It was returned to the dealer and dealer is fixing the problems.

narrative.headline: What 2023 Nissan Armada owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 5 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Visibility/Wiper (60% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
